title: Smoky Avocado Toast
description: A flavorful and healthy breakfast option that combines the creaminess of avocado with the smokiness of smoked salmon. Perfect for a quick morning meal.

ingredients.name: Smoked Salmon
ingredients.notes: Lox or smoked salmon work well

instructions: Preheat your toaster or toaster oven to 400°F (200°C).
Toast the bread until lightly browned.
Mash or slice the avocado and spread on the toast.
Top the avocado with smoked salmon.
Season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using).
Squeeze a sliver of lemon juice over the top (if using).
